steps.title: Use the input x = 0
steps.content: The function is $h(x)=x+b$, and the given value is $h(0)=21$. Substitute $x=0$: $$h(0)=0+b=b.$$

steps.title: Read off b
steps.content: Because $h(0)=b$ and the problem says $h(0)=21$, the constant must be $b=21$.

steps.title: Check by substitution
steps.content: With $b=21$, the function is $h(x)=x+21$. Then $h(0)=0+21=21$, exactly matching the given condition. The answer is 21.
